title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Add unknown branch weight to all selects in InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp

tests.test_body:
define i4 @sdiv_mul_nsw_constant_mul_constant2(i4 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_mul_nsw_constant_mul_constant2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD4:%.*]] = sub i4 0, [[A:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD5:%.*]] = shl i4 [[A]], 3
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = sdiv i4 [[ADD5]], [[ADD4]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i4 [[DIV]]
  %add4 = mul i4 %a, -1
  %add5 = mul nsw i4 %a, -8
  %div = sdiv i4 %add5, %add4
  ret i4 %div
}

define i4 @sdiv_mul_nsw_constant_mul_constant3(i4 %a) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_mul_nsw_constant_mul_constant3(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i4 [[A:%.*]], -8
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i4 1, i4 -1, !prof [[PROF1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i4 [[DIV]]
  %add4 = mul i4 %a, -1
  %add5 = mul nsw i4 %a, 1
  %div = sdiv i4 %add5, %add4
  ret i4 %div
}

define <2 x i32> @test19vec(<2 x i32> %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test19vec(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq <2 x i32> [[X:%.*]], splat (i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[A:%.*]] = zext <2 x i1> [[TMP1]] to <2 x i32>
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[A]]
  %A = udiv <2 x i32> <i32 1, i32 1>, %x
  ret <2 x i32> %A
}

define i32 @test20(i32 %x) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test20(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X_FR:%.*]] = freeze i32 [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = add i32 [[X_FR]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = icmp ult i32 [[TMP1]], 3
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[A:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP2]], i32 [[X_FR]], i32 0, !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[A]]
  %A = sdiv i32 1, %x
  ret i32 %A
}

define i32 @udiv_and_shl(i32 %a, i32 %b, i32 %c) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @udiv_and_shl(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV1:%.*]] = lshr i32 [[C:%.*]], [[A:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[DIV1]]
  %shl = shl i32 1, %a
  %and = and i32 %b, %shl
  %div = udiv i32 %c, %and
  ret i32 %div
}

define <2 x float> @fmul_bool_vec_commute(<2 x float> %px, <2 x i1> %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define <2 x float> @fmul_bool_vec_commute(
; CHECK-SAME: <2 x float> [[PX:%.*]], <2 x i1> [[Y:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X:%.*]] = fmul nnan nsz <2 x float> [[PX]], [[PX]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = select nnan nsz <2 x i1> [[Y]], <2 x float> [[X]], <2 x float> zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x float> [[M]]
  %x = fmul nnan nsz <2 x float> %px, %px
  %z = uitofp <2 x i1> %y to <2 x float>
  %m = fmul nnan nsz <2 x float> %x, %z
  ret <2 x float> %m
}

define i32 @lowbit_mul(i32 %a, i32 %b) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @lowbit_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = trunc i32 [[A:%.*]] to i1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i32 [[B:%.*]], i32 0, !prof [[PROF1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[E]]
  %d = and i32 %a, 1
  %e = mul i32 %d, %b
  ret i32 %e
}

define i32 @mul_bool(i32 %x, i1 %y) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_bool(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = select i1 [[Y:%.*]], i32 [[X:%.*]], i32 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[M]]
  %z = zext i1 %y to i32
  %m = mul i32 %z, %x
  ret i32 %m
}

define <2 x i32> @mul_bool_vec_commute(<2 x i32> %px, <2 x i1> %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_bool_vec_commute(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X:%.*]] = mul <2 x i32> [[PX:%.*]], [[PX]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[Y:%.*]], <2 x i32> [[X]], <2 x i32> zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[M]]
  %x = mul <2 x i32> %px, %px
  %z = zext <2 x i1> %y to <2 x i32>
  %m = mul <2 x i32> %x, %z
  ret <2 x i32> %m
}

declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @mul_bools_use2(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_bools_use2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZY:%.*]] = zext i1 [[Y:%.*]] to i32
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use32(i32 [[ZY]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MULBOOL:%.*]] = and i1 [[Y]], [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = zext i1 [[MULBOOL]] to i32
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
  %zx = zext i1 %x to i32
  %zy = zext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %zy)
  %r = mul i32 %zy, %zx
  ret i32 %r
}
tests.source_program:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @mul_bools_use2(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
  %zx = zext i1 %x to i32
  %zy = zext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %zy)
  %r = mul i32 %zy, %zx
  ret i32 %r
}

tests.test_body:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @mul_bools_use3(i1 %x, i1 %y) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_bools_use3(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZX:%.*]] = zext i1 [[X:%.*]] to i32
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use32(i32 [[ZX]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZY:%.*]] = zext i1 [[Y:%.*]] to i32
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use32(i32 [[ZY]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[X]], i32 [[ZY]], i32 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
  %zx = zext i1 %x to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %zx)
  %zy = zext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %zy)
  %r = mul i32 %zx, %zy
  ret i32 %r
}
tests.source_program:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @mul_bools_use3(i1 %x, i1 %y) !prof !0 {
  %zx = zext i1 %x to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %zx)
  %zy = zext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %zy)
  %r = mul i32 %zx, %zy
  ret i32 %r
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @mul_sext_bool(i1 %x) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_sext_bool(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = select i1 [[X:%.*]], i32 -42, i32 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[M]]
  %s = sext i1 %x to i32
  %m = mul i32 %s, 42
  ret i32 %m
}

declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @mul_sext_bool_use(i1 %x) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_sext_bool_use(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S:%.*]] = sext i1 [[X:%.*]] to i32
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use32(i32 [[S]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = select i1 [[X]], i32 -42, i32 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[M]]
  %s = sext i1 %x to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %s)
  %m = mul i32 %s, 42
  ret i32 %m
}
tests.source_program:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @mul_sext_bool_use(i1 %x) !prof !0 {
  %s = sext i1 %x to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %s)
  %m = mul i32 %s, 42
  ret i32 %m
}

tests.test_body:
define i16 @mul_udiv_zext_uneq(i8 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_udiv_zext_uneq(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = udiv i8 [[X:%.*]], 20
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NARROW:%.*]] = mul nuw i8 [[DIV]], 15
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = zext i8 [[NARROW]] to i16
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i16 [[MUL]]
  %div = udiv i8 %x, 20
  %zext = zext i8 %div to i16
  %mul = mul i16 %zext, 15
  ret i16 %mul
}

define i32 @neg(i32 %i) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @neg(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = sub i32 0, [[I:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[T]]
  %t = mul i32 %i, -1
  ret i32 %t
}

define i32 @not_lowbit_mul(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @not_lowbit_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[D:%.*]] = and i32 [[A:%.*]], 2
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E:%.*]] = mul i32 [[D]], [[B:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[E]]
  %d = and i32 %a, 2
  %e = mul i32 %d, %b
  ret i32 %e
}

define i32 @pow2_multiplier(i32 %A) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @pow2_multiplier(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[B:%.*]] = shl i32 [[A:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[B]]
  %B = mul i32 %A, 2
  ret i32 %B
}

define <2 x i8> @shl1_decrement_vec(<2 x i8> %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @shl1_decrement_vec(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MULSHL:%.*]] = shl <2 x i8> <i8 42, i8 -3>, [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M1:%.*]] = add <2 x i8> [[MULSHL]], <i8 -42, i8 3>
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i8> [[M1]]
  %pow2x = shl <2 x i8> <i8 -1, i8 -1>, %x
  %x1 = xor <2 x i8> %pow2x, <i8 -1, i8 -1>
  %m = mul <2 x i8> %x1, <i8 42, i8 -3>
  ret <2 x i8> %m
}

define <2 x i32> @signbit_mul_vec_commute(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @signbit_mul_vec_commute(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ISNEG:%.*]] = icmp slt <2 x i32> [[A:%.*]], zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[ISNEG]], <2 x i32> [[B:%.*]], <2 x i32> zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[E]]
  %d = lshr <2 x i32> %a, <i32 31, i32 31>
  %e = mul <2 x i32> %b, %d
  ret <2 x i32> %e
}

define i32 @signsplat_mul(i32 %x) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @signsplat_mul(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ISNEG:%.*]] = icmp slt i32 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = select i1 [[ISNEG]], i32 -42, i32 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[MUL]]
  %ash = ashr i32 %x, 31
  %mul = mul i32 %ash, 42
  ret i32 %mul
}

define i32 @test10(i32 %a, i32 %b) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test10(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ISNEG:%.*]] = icmp slt i32 [[A:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E:%.*]] = select i1 [[ISNEG]], i32 [[B:%.*]], i32 0, !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[E]]
  %c = icmp slt i32 %a, 0
  %d = zext i1 %c to i32
  %e = mul i32 %d, %b
  ret i32 %e
}

define i8 @big_divisor(i8 %x) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @big_divisor(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X_FR:%.*]] = freeze i8 [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[X_FR]], -127
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = add i8 [[X_FR]], 127
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[REM:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i8 [[X_FR]], i8 [[TMP2]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[REM]]
  %rem = urem i8 %x, -127
  ret i8 %rem
}

define i5 @biggest_divisor(i5 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @biggest_divisor(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X_FR:%.*]] = freeze i5 [[X:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DOTNOT:%.*]] = icmp eq i5 [[X_FR]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[REM:%.*]] = select i1 [[DOTNOT]], i5 0, i5 [[X_FR]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i5 [[REM]]
  %rem = urem i5 %x, -1
  ret i5 %rem
}

define i64 @rem_signed(i64 %x1, i64 %y2) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @rem_signed(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X1_FR:%.*]] = freeze i64 [[X1:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = srem i64 [[X1_FR]], [[Y2:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[TMP1]]
  %r = sdiv i64 %x1, %y2
  %r7 = mul i64 %r, %y2
  %r8 = sub i64 %x1, %r7
  ret i64 %r8
}

define i64 @rem_unsigned(i64 %x1, i64 %y2) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @rem_unsigned(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X1_FR:%.*]] = freeze i64 [[X1:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = urem i64 [[X1_FR]], [[Y2:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[TMP1]]
  %r = udiv i64 %x1, %y2
  %r7 = mul i64 %r, %y2
  %r8 = sub i64 %x1, %r7
  ret i64 %r8
}

define i8 @urem_with_sext_bool_divisor(i1 %x, i8 %y) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @urem_with_sext_bool_divisor(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Y_FROZEN:%.*]] = freeze i8 [[Y:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[Y_FROZEN]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[REM:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i8 0, i8 [[Y_FROZEN]], !prof [[PROF1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[REM]]
  %s = sext i1 %x to i8
  %rem = urem i8 %y, %s
  ret i8 %rem
}

declare void @use(i32)

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32, i1 immarg) #0

define i32 @sdiv_abs_extra_use(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_abs_extra_use(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[A:%.*]] = call i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32 [[X:%.*]], i1 true)
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i32 [[A]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sdiv i32 [[A]], [[X]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
  %a = call i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32 %x, i1 true)
  call void @use(i32 %a)
  %r = sdiv i32 %a, %x
  ret i32 %r
}
tests.source_program:
declare void @use(i32)

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32, i1 immarg) #0

define i32 @sdiv_abs_extra_use(i32 %x) {
  %a = call i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32 %x, i1 true)
  call void @use(i32 %a)
  %r = sdiv i32 %a, %x
  ret i32 %r
}

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32, i1 immarg) #0

define i32 @sdiv_abs_nsw(i32 %x) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sdiv_abs_nsw(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp sgt i32 [[X:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i32 1, i32 -1, !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
  %a = call i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32 %x, i1 true)
  %r = sdiv i32 %a, %x
  ret i32 %r
}
tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32, i1 immarg) #0

define i32 @sdiv_abs_nsw(i32 %x) !prof !0 {
  %a = call i32 @llvm.abs.i32(i32 %x, i1 true)
  %r = sdiv i32 %a, %x
  ret i32 %r
}

tests.test_body:
@X = external global i32

define i64 @test_sdiv_canonicalize_constexpr(i64 %L1) {
; currently opt folds (sub nsw i64 0, constexpr) -> (sub i64, 0, constexpr).
; sdiv canonicalize requires a nsw sub.
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_sdiv_canonicalize_constexpr(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[B4:%.*]] = sdiv i64 [[L1:%.*]], sub (i64 0, i64 ptrtoint (ptr @X to i64))
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[B4]]
  %v1 = ptrtoint ptr @X to i64
  %B8 = sub nsw i64 0, %v1
  %B4 = sdiv i64 %L1, %B8
  ret i64 %B4
}

define i32 @test_sdiv_canonicalize_op0(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_sdiv_canonicalize_op0(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SDIV1:%.*]] = sdiv i32 [[X:%.*]], [[Y:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SDIV:%.*]] = sub nsw i32 0, [[SDIV1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[SDIV]]
  %neg = sub nsw i32 0, %x
  %sdiv = sdiv i32 %neg, %y
  ret i32 %sdiv
}

define i8 @urem_assume(i8 %x, i8 %n) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @urem_assume(
; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[N:%.*]]) !prof [[PROF0:![0-9]+]] {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[X_FR:%.*]] = freeze i8 [[X]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[X_FR]], [[N]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    tail call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[CMP]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i8 [[X_FR]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ADD]], [[N]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OUT:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i8 0, i8 [[ADD]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[OUT]]
  %cmp = icmp ult i8 %x, %n
  tail call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  %add = add nuw i8 %x, 1
  %out = urem i8 %add, %n
  ret i8 %out
}
tests.source_program:
define i8 @urem_assume(i8 %x, i8 %n) !prof !0 {
  %cmp = icmp ult i8 %x, %n
  tail call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  %add = add nuw i8 %x, 1
  %out = urem i8 %add, %n
  ret i8 %out
}

tests.test_body:
define noundef i8 @urem_with_opposite_condition(i8 %x, i8 %n) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define noundef i8 @urem_with_opposite_condition(
; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[N:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COND:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[X]], [[N]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[COND]], [[DOTBB1:label %.*]], [[DOTBB0:label %.*]]
; CHECK:       [[_BB0:.*:]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i8 [[X]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OUT:%.*]] = urem i8 [[ADD]], [[N]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[OUT]]
; CHECK:       [[_BB1:.*:]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 0
  %cond = icmp ult i8 %x, %n
  br i1 %cond, label %.bb1, label %.bb0

.bb0:                                             ; preds = %0
  %add = add i8 %x, 1
  %out = urem i8 %add, %n
  ret i8 %out

.bb1:                                             ; preds = %0
  ret i8 0
}
tests.source_program:
define noundef i8 @urem_with_opposite_condition(i8 %x, i8 %n) {
  %cond = icmp ult i8 %x, %n
  br i1 %cond, label %.bb1, label %.bb0

.bb0:                                             ; preds = %0
  %add = add i8 %x, 1
  %out = urem i8 %add, %n
  ret i8 %out

.bb1:                                             ; preds = %0
  ret i8 0
}
